message:
fix(core,planner,types): minor correctness and clippy fixes

connection.rs: Add missing .as_deref() on WHERE clause pushdown to
match the expected reference type, and remove unreachable wildcard arm
in expr_references_only_col_map now that all Expr variants are covered.

planner: Pass std::cmp::Ordering by value (Copy type) instead of by
reference in literal_satisfies_predicate_literal.

cx.rs: Extract attached_native_cx mutex lock result into a named
binding before the if-let check in both sync_native_cx_cancel and
effective_native_cx, avoiding a temporary that would be dropped while
still borrowed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
